_comment: Commercial Domain Bounded Context Model — ~70 entities across 9 sub-domains from Confluence PC space. Source: Sub-domain entity detail pages 3.A-3.J (excluding 3.I transferred to Finance).
_source: Confluence PC space Domain Entity Model pages (320340045 parent, sub-domains 3.A, 3.B, 3.C, 3.D, 3.E, 3.F, 3.G, 3.H, 3.J)

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC1 Product Catalogue
nodes.description: Core Domain — Product and Item Management. Upstream: BC3 (Shared Kernel). Downstream: BC4, BC5, BC6.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC2 Merchandise Hierarchy
nodes.description: Generic Domain — Merchandise Hierarchy and Classification. Reference data provider for all bounded contexts.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC3 Supplier & Procurement
nodes.description: Core Domain — Supplier and Vendor Management + Buying and Procurement (merged). Upstream: BC1. Downstream: FD1 Supply Chain, FD Finance.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC4 Pricing & Markdown
nodes.description: Core Domain — Pricing. Upstream: BC1, BC3. Downstream: BC5, POS/E-Commerce.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC5 Promotion Management
nodes.description: Core Domain — Promotions and Offers. Upstream: BC4, BC1. Downstream: POS/E-Commerce/Supplier Portal.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC6 Assortment & Range
nodes.description: Core Domain — Assortment and Range Planning. Upstream: BC1, BC4. Downstream: BC7.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC7 Allocation & Replenishment
nodes.description: Supporting Domain — Distribution Planning and Allocation. Upstream: BC6. Downstream: FD1 Supply Chain.

nodes.label: BoundedContext
nodes.name: BC8 Supplier Collaboration
nodes.description: Supporting Domain — Supplier Collaboration, Consignment and Extended Valuation. Cross-domain dependencies with FD1 Supply Chain and FD Finance.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Item
nodes.description: The core tradeable unit in the system. Master reference for pricing, inventory, procurement, and assortment.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Barcode
nodes.description: GS1-compliant barcode assignments for items (EAN-13, GTIN-14, or internal barcodes for own-brand).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Pack Item
nodes.description: Defines how items are packaged together for sale (case packs, multi-packs, display units).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Differentiator
nodes.description: Item variants that are sold as separate SKUs (size, color, flavor).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Product Attributes
nodes.description: Extended item attributes for specific categories (fresh food, apparel, electronics).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Product Media
nodes.description: Images, videos, and other media assets associated with items.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Item-Supplier
nodes.description: Links items to suppliers with negotiated costs, lead times, and pack configurations.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Related Item
nodes.description: Cross-sell, up-sell, and substitution relationships between items.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Deposit Item
nodes.description: Items that require a deposit (glass bottles, containers, etc.).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Transformable Item
nodes.description: Items purchased as whole units and broken down for retail sale (e.g., carcasses).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Transformable Component
nodes.description: The retail cuts/components resulting from transformable item processing.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Item-Location (Ranging)
nodes.description: Defines which items are ranged at which locations (stores/warehouses).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Virtual Warehouse
nodes.description: Logical stockholding granularity for omni-channel fulfilment.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Regular Retail Price
nodes.description: Base selling price for an item at a location. Core reference for all pricing.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Company
nodes.description: Highest level of merchandise and organisational hierarchy. CP Axtra Public Company Limited.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Division
nodes.description: Merchandise division level (Food Division, Non-Food Division).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Group (Department)
nodes.description: RMS 'Group' = Business 'Department'. Buyer assignment at this level for Makro only. NOT USED by Lotus's.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Department (Section)
nodes.description: RMS 'Department' = Business 'Section'. Financial accountability level.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Class
nodes.description: Merchandise class level within department.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Subclass
nodes.description: Lowest merchandise hierarchy level. Buyer/CM assignment at subclass level for Lotus's.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Chain
nodes.description: Organisational chain level (Makro wholesale, Lotus's retail formats).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Area
nodes.description: Geographic area/region (Bangkok Metropolitan, Central, North, Northeast, South, East, Malaysia).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: District
nodes.description: District level within area for store grouping.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Store
nodes.description: Individual store location.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Warehouse
nodes.description: Distribution centre or warehouse location.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Location List
nodes.description: Dynamic store groupings for mass operations.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Location Trait
nodes.description: Store attributes for grouping (format, size, demographic profile).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Transfer Entity
nodes.description: Inter-company stock movement and fiscal compliance between legal entities.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Fiscal Calendar
nodes.description: NRF 4-5-4 reporting calendar for weeks, months, halves, and years.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Supplier
nodes.description: Supplier/vendor master record. GLN field NOT APPLICABLE - removed.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Supplier Site
nodes.description: Individual supplier location with specific payment terms and lead times.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Supplier Parent
nodes.description: Parent company for multi-site suppliers.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Expense Profile
nodes.description: Cost build-up for landed cost calculation. SIMPLIFIED ONLY - no multi-currency currently.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Partner
nodes.description: Franchise/licensee partner model. NOT MAINTAINED at CP Axtra.

attributes.note: CP Axtra operates all formats directly

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Cost Zone Group
nodes.description: Cost zone grouping. NOT IN USE at CP Axtra.

attributes.note: Single cost structure per supplier-item used instead

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Cost Zone
nodes.description: Cost zone definition. NOT IN USE at CP Axtra.

attributes.note: Single cost structure per supplier-item used instead

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Purchase Order
nodes.description: Commitment to a supplier for specified quantity of items at agreed costs. PO creation owned by Commercials; execution owned by Supply Chain (FD1).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: PO Detail
nodes.description: Line items on a purchase order specifying item, quantity, and cost.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Contract
nodes.description: Pre-negotiated supplier agreements with volume commitments and pricing terms.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Deal
nodes.description: Vendor-funded promotions and commercial income agreements. PARTIAL - RMS Deal module NOT USED for certain deal types (VFP/VFM via Blue Yonder).

attributes.note: VFP/VFM via Blue Yonder instead of RMS Deal module

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Deal Component
nodes.description: Components of a deal (volume rebates, growth incentives, promotional allowances). PARTIAL - same gap as Deal.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Bracket Cost
nodes.description: Volume-based cost tiers for wholesale buying. UNDER REVIEW - Fulfillment domain to confirm usage.

attributes.note: As I know, it is not use. Please reconfirm with Fulfillment domain

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Cost Component
nodes.description: Individual cost components for ELC calculation (duty, freight, insurance, handling).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Up-Charge
nodes.description: Internal transfer pricing between legal entities.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: ELC (Estimated Landed Cost)
nodes.description: Calculated landed cost for import items including duties, freight, and handling.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: RTV (Return to Vendor)
nodes.description: Process for returning damaged, expired, or excess stock to suppliers.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Regular Retail Price
nodes.description: Base selling price for an item. Core reference for all pricing operations.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Price Zone Group
nodes.description: Grouping of price zones. NOT IN USE at CP Axtra.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Price Zone
nodes.description: Geographic price zone definition. NOT IN USE at CP Axtra.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Price Change
nodes.description: Scheduled price changes with effective dates and lead times.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Clearance Markdown
nodes.description: Scheduled markdown cadence for slow-moving and seasonal clearance.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Future Retail
nodes.description: Future-dated retail prices for new items or planned price changes.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Slab Price
nodes.description: Multi-tier volume pricing for Makro wholesale. Classified as promotion mechanism, not pricing.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Competitive Price
nodes.description: Competitor price tracking. NOT IN USE - handled by separate analytics tool.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Margin Target
nodes.description: Target margin percentages by category. UNDER REVIEW.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Tax Rule / VAT
nodes.description: VAT and tax configuration for items and locations.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Promotion
nodes.description: Container for one or more offer components that temporarily reduce selling prices. Lotus's: 10,000+ promotions monthly per store, 1-day lead time, no duration limit, active modify allowed.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Simple Discount Offer
nodes.description: Direct discount on item, item group, or hierarchy level. Lotus's uses ONLY fixed promotional selling price.

attributes.note: Lotus's: Percentage-off and amount-off NOT used, only fixed price

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Multi-Buy Offer
nodes.description: Buy X, Get Y style promotion (BOGO, Buy 2 Get 1 Free, bundle deals). Lotus's: Reward quantity always 1 unit, POS selects cheapest variant for free item.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Buy-Get-Free Offer
nodes.description: Buy specified quantity, get free item.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Threshold Offer
nodes.description: Discount triggered when purchase quantity or value exceeds threshold. Multi-tier threshold = SLAB promotion.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Coupon
nodes.description: RPM coupon mechanic. Digital coupons via Lotus's app are Customer domain.

attributes.note: RPM coupon only; digital coupons = Customer domain

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Conflict Rule
nodes.description: Rules for resolving overlapping promotions on the same item. Best Deal runs at POS, not RPM.

attributes.note: Lotus's: Best Deal logic at POS, not in RPM

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: VFP (Vendor-Funded Promotion)
nodes.description: Vendor-funded promotional income. NOT APPLY for Lotus's - Makro only.

attributes.note: Makro only; Lotus's uses different mechanism

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: VFM (Vendor-Funded Markdown)
nodes.description: Vendor-funded clearance markdowns. NOT APPLY for Lotus's - Makro only.

attributes.note: Makro only; Lotus's uses different mechanism

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Assortment Plan
nodes.description: Defines which items are ranged at which locations for a given period.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Item-Location (Ranging)
nodes.description: Item ranging at specific locations (same entity as 3.A, shared across contexts).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Listing/Delisting
nodes.description: Process of adding (listing) or removing (delisting) items from range.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Planogram
nodes.description: Visual merchandising layout. Blue Yonder used for planogram and space planning, NOT Oracle RMS.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Location Cluster
nodes.description: Grouping of locations for assortment planning.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Season/Phase
nodes.description: Seasonal calendar for assortment planning.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Item List
nodes.description: Curated list of items for assortment planning or allocation.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Allocation
nodes.description: Distribution of inventory from warehouse to stores. Strategic allocation planning owned by PC; physical distribution execution owned by FD1 per D-031.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Allocation Detail
nodes.description: Per-store allocation quantities and fulfilment status.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Replenishment Parameters
nodes.description: Automated replenishment setup parameters (min/max stock, lead times, safety stock).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Recommended Order Qty (ROQ)
nodes.description: System-calculated recommended order quantities based on demand forecast.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Open-to-Buy (OTB)
nodes.description: Budgetary control mechanism limiting PO value by department and period.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Supplier Communication Log
nodes.description: Formal audit trail of supplier interactions across channels.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Supplier Performance Scorecard
nodes.description: Periodic assessment of supplier performance across delivery, quality, compliance metrics.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Supplier Registration Workflow
nodes.description: New supplier onboarding lifecycle with due diligence and system setup.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Consignment Agreement
nodes.description: Commercial terms for consignment trading (supplier retains ownership until sale).

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Consignment Stock Position
nodes.description: Off-balance-sheet inventory tracking for consignment stock.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Consignment Sales Report
nodes.description: Weekly sales-based settlement for Type 2 consignment.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Commercial Income Accrual
nodes.description: Accounting recognition of deal/rebate income before settlement.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Commercial Income Claim
nodes.description: Supplier billing for earned commercial income.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Weighted Average Cost Calculation
nodes.description: Full audit trail for inventory valuation WAC updates.

nodes.label: Entity
nodes.name: Shelf Capacity Profile
nodes.description: Links planogram allocations to replenishment optimisation.
